title: HLEN
description: Returns the number of fields in a hash.

returns.description: The number of entries (fields) contained in the hash stored at key. If the specified key does not exist, 0 is returned assuming an empty hash.
The number of entries (fields) contained in the hash stored at key. If the specified key does not exist, 0 is returned assuming an empty hash.
Long integer-reply number of fields in the hash, or 0 when key does not exist.
Long integer-reply number of fields in the hash, or 0 when key does not exist.
Long integer-reply number of fields in the hash, or 0 when key does not exist.

ioredis.signature: hlen(key: RedisKey, callback?: Callback<number>): Result<number, Context>;, /**, * Get the values of all the given hash fields, * - _group_: hash, * - _complexity_: O(N) where N is the number of fields being requested., * - _since_: 2.0.0, */, hmget(, ...args: [, key: RedisKey, ...fields: (string | Buffer)[], callback: Callback<(string | null)[]>, ])

number of fields in the hash

content:
Returns the number of fields contained in the hash stored at `key`. ## Examples {{% redis-cli %}} HSET myhash field1 "Hello" HSET myhash field2 "World" HLEN myhash {{% /redis-cli %}} ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information {{< multitabs id="hlen-return-info" tab1="RESP2" tab2="RESP3" >}} [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of fields in the hash, or 0 when the key does not exist. -tab-sep- [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of the fields in the hash, or 0 when the key does not exist. {{< /multitabs >}}
example:
HSET myhash field1 "Hello"
HSET myhash field2 "World"
HLEN myhash
intro: Returns the number of fields contained in the hash stored at `key`.
